# Anokolisa - Hero's Journey / Moon Graveyard

This folder contains the Moon Graveyard environment asset pack as a vendor asset for Ash Company.

Recommended use:

- mood/reference for darker Ash Company environments
- palette study
- future ruins/graveyard background experiments

The backgrounds are larger than the current compact battlefield panel, so they should probably be cropped, scaled, or adapted before in-game use.

The package note is in `Social/Autor_note.txt`.
